headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 13, 2026**
article:
The day's top news saw the Baltimore Orioles dominate the New York Yankees 7-0, with Kyle Bradish leading the way on the mound. The Cleveland Guardians secured a 4-2 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, while the Washington Nationals edged the Cincinnati Reds 8-7 in a thrilling matchup. The Colorado Rockies routed the Pittsburgh Pirates 10-4, with Mickey Moniak leading the Rockies' offense.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries, with the Athletics' Brooks Kriske being placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement. The Miami Marlins' Robby Snelling has also been placed on the 15-day injured list with a left elbow UCL sprain. Other teams have also suffered injuries, including the New York Mets, Cincinnati Reds, Los Angeles Angels, Baltimore Orioles, and Athletics.

The Los Angeles Dodgers made a move on May 12, acquiring center fielder Alek Thomas in a trade with the Arizona Diamondbacks. The Cleveland Guardians also made a trade, acquiring catcher Patrick Bailey from the San Francisco Giants in exchange for left-hander Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired right-hander Enyel Garcia and right-hander Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Orioles in Dominant 7-0 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a convincing 7-0 victory over the New York Yankees, with Kyle Bradish leading the way on the mound. Bradish pitched 6.0 innings, striking out 7 batters and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Angels in Thrilling Matchup**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a 4-2 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, with Parker Messick earning the win after 6.2 innings of work.

top_news.title: **Nationals Edge Reds in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a hard-fought 8-7 win over the Cincinnati Reds, overcoming a late deficit to take the game. Tyler Stephenson led the Reds' offense with a home run and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Rout Pirates 10-4**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates, securing a 10-4 victory. Mickey Moniak led the Rockies' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run, 5-RBI performance.

top_news.title: **Athletics RHP Brooks Kriske Lands on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Athletics right-handed pitcher Brooks Kriske has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement. The injury occurred on May 13, 2026.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire Alek Thomas in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers made a move on May 12, 2026, acquiring center fielder Alek Thomas in a trade. Thomas joins the Dodgers after being dealt from the Arizona Diamondbacks.
